title: AYFS hosts Youth Day event
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The AYFS Youth Zone...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The AYFS Youth Zone hosted a vibrant and impactful Youth Day health event at the New Horizons Clinic over the weekend.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The AYFS Youth Zone hosted a vibrant and impactful Youth Day health event at the New Horizons Clinic over the weekend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event was organised by Marielle Peters (Youth Zone champion), Ashley Williams (chairperson and event MC), and Glenda Windvogel (assistant management member)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The two-hour programme aimed to empower and educate youth on health and wellness, with a special focus on family planning, safe sex and building resilience.","html":"The two-hour programme aimed to empower and educate youth on health and wellness, with a special focus on family planning, safe sex and building resilience."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Guests included learners from Plettenberg Bay Secondary School, along with their talented choir group, as well as members of Masizame, a foster care organisation from KwaNokuthula.","html":"Guests included learners from Plettenberg Bay Secondary School, along with their talented choir group, as well as members of Masizame, a foster care organisation from KwaNokuthula."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This was followed by a health consent talk with the learners, presented by the social workers. A key highlight of the event was an informative session on family planning and safe sex, delivered by Peters, which educated the youth on responsible health choices.","html":"This was followed by a health consent talk with the learners, presented by the social workers. A key highlight of the event was an informative session on family planning and safe sex, delivered by Peters, which educated the youth on responsible health choices."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Plettenberg Bay Secondary School choir added a joyful atmosphere with a musical performance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The event concluded with attendees visiting various health information stalls, before enjoying a delicious meal sponsored by Building the Walls.","html":"The event concluded with attendees visiting various health information stalls, before enjoying a delicious meal sponsored by Building the Walls."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information on the Youth Zone, Williams can be contacted on 081 040 9977.","html":"For more information on the Youth Zone, Williams can be contacted on 081 040 9977."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
